name: thumbgate
description: Stop paying for the same AI mistake twice. Frontier LLMs are expensive — every repeat hallucination or retry loop burns tokens you're paying for. ThumbGate blocks known-bad tool calls *before* they reach the model. One 👎, the agent physically cannot make that mistake again. 33 pre-action gates, budget enforcement, self-protection, NIST/SOC2 compliance tags, and a live tokens-saved counter.
